description_long: This rifle features a robust, industrial design with a metallic body that is heavily riveted and reinforced, suggesting durability and strength. The main body is predominantly gray with visible wear, scratches, and yellow hazard stripes, giving it a utilitarian, possibly post-apocalyptic or sci-fi appearance. A prominent handle sits atop the receiver, likely for carrying or maneuvering the weapon, and the overall form is angular with several protruding mechanical components. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with a reinforced muzzle and a small attachment at the end, possibly a muzzle brake or compensator. The rear section lacks a traditional stock, instead featuring a compact, mechanical housing that may contain internal mechanisms. Various bolts, panels, and exposed parts contribute to a rugged, functional aesthetic, making it suitable for urban combat or industrial settings.
description: A rugged, metallic rifle with a gray, worn finish, yellow hazard stripes, and a prominent top handle. Its compact, industrial design features a short, reinforced barrel and exposed mechanical details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the top handle, yellow hazard stripes, and detailed mechanical components.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the thick barrel opening, reinforced muzzle, and the angular, riveted top section.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle, mechanical housing, and additional structural details, with less visible hazard striping.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the compact back section, mechanical housing, and the alignment of the top handle.
